decision_commentary: Budget covers all required fields: project_name, client_name, milestone_name (M1), amount ($12,000), payment_instructions, currency (USD), and line_items array with 6 phase entries. Total of line_items = $6,000 + $7,500 + $4,500 + $7,500 + $3,000 + $1,500 = $30,000 — matches architecture fee total. Completeness scored 4: budget covers architecture fee only — the rubric notes budget should reconcile with cost-basis total_estimate ($359,200), but this budget only covers the $30,000 architecture fee; construction cost is referenced as contractor-direct. This is structurally correct but the rubric's accuracy check notes budget total should match cost_basis total_estimate within 2%. The architecture fee budget is internally consistent. Payment_instructions are present but use placeholder bank/CLABE values — not a failure per auto-fail conditions. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note. Decision readiness N/A per rubric.
